title: Constraint Inventory v2
description: Machine-readable constraint state embedded as JSON comment block in LSD file headers. Version 2 adds pylsd_mode, elim_annotated, and structured deferred_4j object array for pyLSD multi-run orchestration.

version.description: Schema version — must be exactly 2 for v2 inventory blocks.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this inventory was written.

mult_count.description: Total number of MULT atom definitions in the LSD file.

hsqc_count.description: Number of HSQC correlations encoded in the LSD file.

hmbc_batches.description: HMBC correlations grouped by iteration batch.

batch.description: Batch number (1-based, one per CASE iteration).

count.description: Number of correlations in this batch.

correlations.description: LSD HMBC atom-pair strings, e.g. '4 8' or '4 8 2 4'.

hmbc_total.description: Total number of HMBC correlations across all batches.

pylsd_mode.description: Whether this LSD file is intended for PyLSDOrchestrator multi-run mode. When true, bare ELIM commands are forbidden (G2 gate).

elim_annotated.description: Whether any HMBC lines carry '; ELIM' trailing comment annotations for PyLSDOrchestrator. When true, pylsd_mode must also be true and deferred_4j must be non-empty (G3 gate).

deferred_4j.description: Array of structured 4J HMBC correlation objects deferred to PyLSDOrchestrator permutation. v2 uses object array (NOT string array as in v1). Identity tuple: (atom1, atom2, correlation_type).

atom1.description: LSD 1-based atom index for carbon in the HMBC correlation.

atom2.description: LSD 1-based atom index for the second carbon in the HMBC correlation.

correlation_type.description: Correlation type — always 'HMBC' for deferred_4j entries.

annotation.description: LSD comment annotation for PyLSDOrchestrator parsing — always '; ELIM'.

grouped_hmbc.description: HMBC lines using grouped atom notation, e.g. 'HMBC 2 (6 7)'.

elim_value.description: Argument N to a bare 'ELIM N M' LSD command (last-resort zero-solution recovery). Non-null only when bare ELIM was written. CAUTION: if pylsd_mode=true, G2 gate blocks any LSD file with non-null elim_value.

deff_not_patterns.description: DEFF NOT badlist SMILES patterns for strained ring exclusion.

deff_fexp.description: DEFF/FEXP goodlist fragment injection data from fragment library search. Null when no fragment was injected.

detection_results.description: Results from lucy detect hybridisation/neighbours/hhb/grouping runs.

applied_from_detection.description: Detection-derived constraints that were applied to this LSD file.

pending_from_detection.description: Detection-derived constraints identified but not yet applied.
